arts.ttl: Celebrate Ramadan and Eid with Manchester City by participating in our exciting Cityzens competitions
arts.sum: Throughout the month, we're offering numerous opportunities to win exclusive prizes and engage with fellow fans. New competitions will be launched every week during Ramadan, so make sure to check back regularly for the latest updates and chances to win.

arts.sum: Manchester City take on Plymouth Argyle in the FA Cup fifth round tonight

arts.ttl: Man City vs Plymouth Argyle – FA Cup match preview and team news
arts.sum: Man City will be looking to avoid any potential upset this evening as they welcome Plymouth Argyle in the FA Cup. Last year’s finalists earned their spot in the fifth round after beating League One outfit Leyton Orient. They returned to winning ways in midweek with a slender victory away to Tottenham. Pep Guardiola has […] The post Man City vs Plymouth Argyle – FA Cup match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man City handed a major boost as Rodri takes significant next step in his recovery after six months out with ACL injury
arts.sum: Man City earlier this year indicated that Rodri could return to action before then by registering the midfielder in their Champions League squad for the latter stages of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola gives Jack Grealish injury update ahead of Plymouth FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola has given an update on Jack Grealish’s injury setbacks ahead of his side’s FA Cup clash against Plymouth.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Plymouth: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The Championship strugglers completed one of the great modern-day cup upsets in the fourth round as they beat runaway Premier League leaders Liverpool - albeit a heavily rotated Reds side - 1-0 at Home Park. Plymouth Argyle hope to pull off another FA Cup giant killing when they take on Manchester City at the Etihad Stadium on Saturday afternoon.
